allow: Bash(echo "---user ~/.claude.json mcp keys---"; cat ~/.claude.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('top mcpServers:', list\(d.get\('mcpServers',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); p=d.get\('projects',{}\).get\('/home/valueerror/STUFF/DEV/00-Next-Exam-DEV/next-exam',{}\); print\('project keys:', list\(p.keys\(\)\)\); print\('project mcpServers:', list\(p.get\('mcpServers',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('enabledMcpjson:', p.get\('enabledMcpjsonServers'\)\); print\('disabledMcpjson:', p.get\('disabledMcpjsonServers'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "parse failed"; echo "---user settings---"; cat ~/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null)
